description: A small impressionist landscape depicting a sun-drenched village square in Saint-Tropez. A large tree with a broad canopy of green foliage dominates the center of the composition, casting dappled shadow on the ground below. Behind and around the tree, colorful buildings in warm ochre, yellow, pink, and blue tones line the square. Two small figures sit in the shade near the base of the tree. The brushwork is loose and energetic, with thick strokes of vibrant color — particularly the interplay of warm yellows and oranges in the sunlight against cool blues and purples in the shadows.
